Metadata.title: LABDS 3D | Professional 3D Printing Services & Custom Solutions
Metadata.description: Premium 3D printing services in Germany. Custom STL manufacturing, prototyping, and high-quality 3D printed products from the Black Forest.
Metadata.keywords: 3D printing service, custom 3D prints, professional 3D printing Germany, STL printing, prototyping, MakerWorld prints, Black Forest 3D printing

Index.title: Professional 3D Printing Services & Custom Solutions.
Index.description: We bring your digital designs to life with industrial-grade precision. From custom STL requests to premium 3D printed products.

tiktok.title: See our Prints in Action
tiktok.subtitle: Follow us on TikTok for daily updates, behind-the-scenes, and new product reveals.

Products.title: Premium 3D Products
Products.description: Discover our curated selection of high-quality 3D printed products, manufactured with precision and care.

nescafe.name: Nescafé Gold 200g Coffee Dispenser
nescafe.shortDescription: Make your coffee routine cleaner, faster and more stylish ☕✨ This 3D printed coffee dispenser is specially designed for the Nescafé Gold 200g jar.
nescafe.description: Upgrade your coffee corner with this practical and eye-catching 3D printed coffee dispenser. Designed specifically for the Nescafé Gold 200g glass jar, it allows you to dispense your instant coffee in a cleaner, faster and more comfortable way. No more opening the jar every time, no more using a spoon, and less coffee mess on your kitchen counter.
nescafe.compatibilityNotice: ⚠️ This product is made only for the Nescafé Gold 200g glass jar. Other sizes or brands may not fit.
highlights: Great for kitchen, office or coffee station ☕
care: Clean only with a dry or slightly damp cloth
Do not expose to direct heat or hot surfaces
nescafe.recommendedUse: Ideal for instant coffee, especially for daily Nescafé Gold users who want a cleaner and more convenient way to prepare their coffee.

calendar.name: Personalized Family Birthday Calendar
calendar.shortDescription: Never forget a birthday again! 🎂✨ This personalized 3D printed birthday calendar is a beautiful and practical wall decoration for families, friends and groups.
calendar.description:
Keep all your special dates in one beautiful place with this personalized 3D printed birthday calendar 🎉💖

This custom board is perfect for remembering birthdays of family, friends, coworkers, or pets. Each month has its own section, and the birthday tags hang underneath the matching month. You can choose the names, dates and colors for each tag, as well as the main colors of the calendar itself. The included heart tags are perfect for couples, anniversaries, or special memories.
calendar.compatibilityNotice: ⚠️ Important: Please double-check all names, dates and colors before ordering. This is a personalized product made exactly with your provided information.
highlights: Names and dates are fully customizable 📅
Great for families, offices or classrooms 🏠

specs.notFits: Mounting screws or hooks not included

notIncluded: Wall screws, hooks or mounting accessories
care: Clean only with a dry or slightly damp cloth
Do not expose to direct heat or hot surfaces
calendar.recommendedUse: Perfect for family homes, grandparents, classrooms, offices, or as a thoughtful personalized gift for any occasion.

pikachu-stitch.name: Pikachu in Stitch Pajamas Figure | 23 cm
pikachu-stitch.shortDescription: An adorable and eye-catching 3D printed fan art figure featuring Pikachu wearing a Stitch-style pajama costume ⚡💙 Perfect for collectors and fans.
pikachu-stitch.description:
Bring extra cuteness and personality to your collection with this amazing 3D printed Pikachu figure in Stitch-style pajamas ⚡💙✨

This collectible piece combines the charm of Pikachu with the playful and cozy look of a Stitch-inspired pajama outfit, creating a fun and unique fan art design that stands out anywhere. It is perfect for display on shelves, desks, gaming setups, or collector spaces.
pikachu-stitch.compatibilityNotice: ⚠️ This is a fan art / inspired collectible. It is an unofficial item and not a licensed product.
highlights: Great display size for shelves and desks
Perfect for collectors and pop culture fans
included: 1x Pikachu in Stitch Pajamas Figure (23 cm)
care: Clean gently with a dry or slightly damp cloth
Handle with care to avoid damage to small details
Keep away from direct heat or open flame
pikachu-stitch.recommendedUse: Perfect as a decorative collectible for home decor, desks, gaming room setups, or as a unique gift for character fans.

fitzek-gnome.name: Sebastian Fitzek Garden Gnome | 35 cm
fitzek-gnome.shortDescription: A unique 3D printed Sebastian Fitzek inspired garden gnome, perfect for thriller fans, collectors and book lovers 🖤📚
fitzek-gnome.description:
Add a dark, funny and unforgettable detail to your collection with this 3D printed Sebastian Fitzek inspired garden gnome 🪴🖤

This decorative gnome figure is a special fan-style collectible made for people who love thrillers, books, unusual decorations and unique 3D printed items. With its large 35 cm height, it has a strong visual presence and works perfectly as a conversation starter in any room. Whether in your reading corner, bookshelf, garden or balcony, this gnome brings personality, humor and a touch of thriller atmosphere to your space.
fitzek-gnome.compatibilityNotice: ⚠️ This is an unofficial fan art / inspired decorative item and is not an official licensed product.
highlights: Great for book lovers and thriller fans
Perfect for reading corners, offices or gardens

specs.notFits: Extreme heat or direct long-term sunlight

notIncluded: Wall screws, hooks or mounting accessories
care: Clean gently with a dry or slightly damp cloth
Handle with care, especially around small details
Keep away from open flame or strong heat sources
fitzek-gnome.recommendedUse: Perfect for book lovers, thriller fans, or as a unique garden, office or reading corner decoration.

orko-bowl.name: Orko Popcorn Bowl | Fan Art Snack Bowl
orko-bowl.shortDescription: A fun and nostalgic 3D printed Orko-inspired popcorn bowl, perfect for movie nights, gaming setups and collectors 🍿✨
orko-bowl.description:
Make your movie nights more magical with this 3D printed Orko-inspired popcorn bowl 🍿🧙‍♂️✨

This unique fan art snack bowl is perfect for fans of classic cartoons, fantasy characters and retro collectibles. The design is inspired by Orko’s iconic look, making it a playful and eye-catching piece for your living room, gaming room or cinema corner. It is 3D printed in separate colored parts and assembled with care to create a colorful, detailed collectible.
orko-bowl.compatibilityNotice: ⚠️ Food Safety Note: This is a decorative snack bowl. For direct food contact, we recommend using a napkin, food-safe liner or wrapped snacks.
highlights: Great for movie nights and gaming setups 🎮
Perfect for popcorn, candy or wrapped snacks ✨
Ideal gift for fans and collectors 🎁

specs.notFits: Hot food, liquids, greasy food or dishwasher

care: Clean gently with a dry or slightly damp cloth
Not dishwasher safe & Do not microwave
Keep away from direct heat or open flame
orko-bowl.recommendedUse: Ideal for movie nights, geek-style snack tables, or as a nostalgic display piece in gaming rooms and fan collections.

Request.title: Custom 3D Printing Request
Request.description: Found a model on MakerWorld or have your own STL file? Send us the details and we'll provide a professional quote within 24 hours.

form.name: Name

form.privacy: By submitting you accept our privacy policy.

success.title: Thank you for your request!
success.description: We'll check your 3D print and contact you via WhatsApp with an individual offer.

About.title: Precision Engineering in 3D
About.story: LABDS 3D Print started with a simple passion for creation. Based in the heart of the Black Forest, we combine traditional craftsmanship values with cutting-edge additive manufacturing technology.
About.mission: Our mission is to bring your digital ideas to life with industrial precision, premium materials, and a commitment to sustainable production.

Contact.title: Contact Our Experts
Contact.subtitle: Have a complex project or a simple question? Our 3D printing experts are here to assist you.

Footer.tagline: Professional 3D printing and custom additive manufacturing from the Black Forest.
